records.ety: [L. occupans, p. pr. of occupare: cf. F. occupant. See Occupy.]

defs: One who occupies, or takes possession; one who has the actual use or possession, or is in possession, of a thing; as, the occupant of the apartment is not at home.
notes: ☞ This word, in law, sometimes signifies one who takes the first possession of a thing that has no owner.
